data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multi-channel communication (email, SMS, push notification) as outlined in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of these channels within the system. The absence of any API reads or persisted state checks related to multi-channel communication leads to a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of multi-channel communication (email, SMS, push notification) being implemented or functioning.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
